queries.question: Provide a list of all concerts and also provide a list of theater play with a venue with a capacity of 500.
queries.sql:
SELECT Live_Event.Title 
FROM Live_Event
WHERE Live_Event.Live_Performance = "Concert" OR Live_Event.Live_Performance = "Theater Play" AND Live_Event.Venue_Capacity = 500
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?live_event a :Live_Event .
  ?live_event p:Title ?title .
  ?live_event p:Live_Performance ?live_performance_w .
  ?live_event p:Live_Performance ?live_performance_w2 .
  ?live_event p:Venue_Capacity ?venue_capacity_w .
  FILTER((STR(?live_performance_w) = "Concert" || (STR(?live_performance_w2) = "Theater Play" && (STR(?venue_capacity_w) = "500" || STR(?venue_capacity_w) = "500.0"))))
}

queries.question: Show concerts and theater plays taking place in a venue with a capacity of 500.
queries.sql:
SELECT Live_Event.Title 
FROM Live_Event
WHERE (Live_Event.Live_Performance = "Concert" OR Live_Event.Live_Performance = "Theater Play") AND Live_Event.Venue_Capacity = 500
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?live_event a :Live_Event .
  ?live_event p:Title ?title .
  ?live_event p:Live_Performance ?live_performance_w .
  ?live_event p:Live_Performance ?live_performance_w2 .
  ?live_event p:Venue_Capacity ?venue_capacity_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?live_performance_w) = "Concert" || STR(?live_performance_w2) = "Theater Play")) && (STR(?venue_capacity_w) = "500" || STR(?venue_capacity_w) = "500.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show concerts and theater plays taking place in a venue with a capacity of 500.
